Bash(cd C:/Users/AbdelazizB/ai-testtool && python -c "
import requests, json, time
s = requests.Session\(\)
s.post\('https://aithentic.testhive.ma/api/login', json={'username':'abdelaziz.bannani@testhive.ma','password':'123456'}\)

for i in range\(20\):
    r = s.get\('https://aithentic.testhive.ma/api/test-runs/155'\)
    d = r.json\(\).get\('data', {}\)
    status = d.get\('status', '?'\)
    passed = d.get\('passed', 0\)
    failed = d.get\('failed', 0\)
    total = d.get\('tests', 0\)
    print\(f'[{i+1}] status={status} passed={passed} failed={failed} total={total}'\)
    if status in \('success', 'failed', 'error', 'stopped'\):
        print\(\)
        results = d.get\('results', []\)
        for r in results:
            icon = 'PASS' if r.get\('success'\) else 'FAIL'
            name = r.get\('name', '?'\)[:45]
            dur = r.get\('durationMs'\) or 0
            st = r.get\('status', '?'\)
            print\(f'  {icon:4s} {name:45s} {st:8s} {dur:>7d}ms'\)
        break
    time.sleep\(15\)
" 2>&1)
